worstQuestions: Show me action items (1.45) - clarification instead of showing all
What is the latest Echelon update? (1.55) - wrong client mapping
How many meetings this month? (2.65) - no time filtering
fixesApplied: System prompt: added strict brevity rules with word limits per query type
System prompt: added rule to answer about asked entity, never substitute clients
Removed action_items from clarification-required intents list
Reduced INTENT_TOKEN_CAPS across all intents for conciseness
Added time-scoped count_query handling (this month/week/today/last month)
META_SYSTEM_PROMPT: added brevity-first rules

worstQuestions: What topics come up most commonly across all client meetings? (1.95) - routed as transcript_search
What is the latest Echelon update? (2.15) - session context bleed
What were the top 3 most important calls today? (2.50) - routed as meeting_summary
fixesApplied: Added regex fast-path for cross-client analysis patterns -> meta_analysis
Added regex for top N calls/meetings -> meta_analysis
System prompt: stronger instruction about answering exact question asked
META_SYSTEM_PROMPT: tightened to 200 words max, topic-based formatting for cross-client questions

worstQuestions: Show me all overdue action items (2.55) - routed as count_query instead of action_items
How has Bearcat been feeling? (2.10) - answers about Echelon
What were the top 3 most important calls today? (2.50) - only one client data
fixesApplied: Added regex fast-path: show/list/display/give me + overdue/action/item -> action_items
Increased action_items token cap to 600, sentiment to 400
System prompt: added rule to show ALL items when no client specified
System prompt: added rule about missing data explanation

fixesApplied: Added REMINDER instruction in user message to answer about asked entity (regressed - reverted in C5)
Added regex fast-path for when+next/last+meeting -> temporal_search

worstQuestions: How has Bearcat been feeling? (2.20) - still answers about Echelon sometimes

Added regex for when temporal questions about meetings
System prompt: added instruction for showing all action items without client
System prompt: added instruction for explaining missing data and what would be needed

persistentWeakSpots.question: What is the latest Echelon update?
persistentWeakSpots.issue: Session context bleed: after discussing Pearce HVAC, the model continues about Pearce instead of switching to Echelon. RAG retrieval also returns Pearce data because it was the most recent context.
persistentWeakSpots.rootCause: Chat history + RAG context both favor the previously-discussed client. Would require changes to rag-engine.js (out of scope) to fix properly.

persistentWeakSpots.question: How has Bearcat been feeling in recent meetings?
persistentWeakSpots.issue: Bearcat is not in the database. Model sometimes answers about Echelon (session context) instead of saying no data.
persistentWeakSpots.rootCause: Non-deterministic LLM behavior. System prompt rule is followed ~50% of the time. The sentiment_analysis handler returns session-context data which confuses the model.

persistentWeakSpots.question: What is our average response time on action items?
persistentWeakSpots.issue: This metric is not computable from available data. Model handles it inconsistently.
persistentWeakSpots.rootCause: No completion timestamps in the database. Would need schema changes to support this query.
